steps.t: Cirith Ungol can be found high above you on a mountainside of the Ephel Dúath to the north of Dath Nethryn. Legolas has asked you to disguise yourself…
The shattered gate of Cirith Ungol faces eastward from the entrance. You have entered Cirith Ungol and should now pass through the gate.
Captain Róglarg can be found in the courtyard of Cirith Ungol. You have disguised yourself as the Silent One and snuck into Cirith Ungol. You should n…
